key_changes: Cookie Session → Supabase GoTrue JWT Auth (9 users)
New tables: employees, profiles, employee_contracts, employee_salary_profiles
RLS policies: 12 policies covering self-read, admin-all, approver-scoped
FastAPI JWT middleware with cookie backward compat
Frontend Supabase client + Bearer token integration
Password change via GoTrue admin API
known_limitations: audit_logs migration still uses SQLite-backed app.py
Some routes still use legacy cookie auth (gradual migration)
employee delete/termination logic not yet migrated to Postgres
rollback: Restore V0.10 SQLite + switch .env IMAGE_TAG=v0.10 + docker compose up -d
